hypothesis: NODES.md node abstraction (69 sessions old) can be operationalized by creating tools/nodes.py as a shared constants module, updating 3+ tools to import from it, and validating node types at signal boundaries.

pre_registration.expected_outcome: 3+ tools import VALID_NODE_TYPES from nodes.py; kill_switch.py, swarm_signal.py, open_lane.py reference node model; L-814 falsification condition met (≥3 tools within 10 sessions of L-814 at S397)
pre_registration.expected_lesson_level: L4 (architecture) — spec-implementation divergence as structural failure mode
pre_registration.failure_mode: tools pass import test but spec remains cosmetic; no behavioral change

method.step_1: Audit active tools for hardcoded 'human' node references
method.step_2: Create tools/nodes.py with NODES.md-derived constants (VALID_NODE_TYPES, capabilities, persistence, bandwidth)
method.step_3: Update swarm_signal.py to import and validate source/target against nodes.py
method.step_4: Update kill_switch.py to import NODE_HUMAN from nodes.py (not string literal)
method.step_5: Update open_lane.py to import NODE_AI_SESSION for --author default
method.step_6: Verify all 3 tools still work after changes

results.node_validation_added: swarm_signal.py warns when source/target not in NODES.md spec

constant_references.kill_switch.py: NODE_HUMAN, VALID_NODE_TYPES for --requested-by help text and default

results.l814_falsification: CONFIRMED — ≥3 tools now reference NODES.md-derived spec within 12 sessions of L-814

finding.summary: Spec-implementation divergence (the 'operationalization gap') is closed by creating an importable module from the spec. When code must import from the spec's module, divergence becomes statically visible — if node types change in NODES.md, nodes.py must update, and importing tools break.
finding.mechanism: Importable constants create a forced dependency between spec and code. Documentation-only specs have zero enforcement; import-chain specs have compiler-visible enforcement.
finding.anti_pattern: Spec-as-documentation (NODES.md existed 69 sessions; 0/207 tools used it)

meta_swarm_reflection.insight: The operationalization gap is not laziness — it is structural. When the spec is only documentation, there is no forcing function. When the spec is importable code, the gap closes automatically at any tool that imports it.
meta_swarm_reflection.conversion_rate: 100% (1 session to close 69-session gap once mechanism was correct)
